zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby於大約1231年出生在英國英格蘭素可特沃斯時，他的父親William de Percy40歲，母親Ellen Balliol26歲。他於1279年與Johanna Neville在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年4月22日在英國英格蘭越可爾奧斯比享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby于大约1231年出生在英国英格兰素可特沃斯时，他的父亲William de Percy40岁，母亲Ellen Balliol26岁。他于1279年与Johanna Neville在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年4月22日在英国英格兰越可爾奧斯比享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby was born about 1231, in Petworth, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Percy, was 40 and his mother, Ellen Balliol, was 26. He married Johanna Neville in 1279, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 April 1295, in Ormesby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby est né environ 1231, à Petworth, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Percy, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ellen Balliol, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Neville en 1279, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1295, à Ormesby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby um 1231 in Petworth, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Percy 40 und seine Mutter Ellen Balliol 26. Er hat 1279 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. April 1295 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Ormesby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby è nato il circa 1231 nel Petworth, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Percy, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Balliol, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Neville nel 1279, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 aprile 1295, nel Ormesby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsbyが約1231年にイギリスイギリススセックスペトウオルスで生まれた時，父William de Percyは40歳，母Ellen Balliolは26歳であった。1279年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohanna Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年4月22日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアオルメスビーで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby(이)가 대략 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 페트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Percy(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Balliol(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1279년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Johanna Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 오메스비에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Percy, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Balliol, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Neville em 1279, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1295, em Ormesby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby родился около 1231 г. в местности петворт, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Percy было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Balliol, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Neville в 1279 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 апреля 1295 г. в местности ормесби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Percy III, Lord of Ormsby nació aproximadamente 1231, en Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Percy, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ellen Balliol, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Johanna Neville en 1279, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de abril de 1295, en Ormesby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
